title: Add integration test for OpenCart HTML migration
description: Create a test for MigrationService._html_to_tiptap to verify transformation of problematic HTML from the user's report (nested bold/links, external images).
acceptance_criteria: Integration test for _html_to_tiptap covers all reported cases
Verified that '<b><a href=...>' gets correctly parsed as nested marks
Verified that external image URLs in description are replaced with local ones
No regressions for existing migration logic
